releaseNotes: Fixed the player controls bar: after it auto-hid once, pressing OK could stop bringing it back at all, and the remote's D-pad couldn't be used to select anything inside it (like turning off closed captions) - both were caused by focus getting lost when the bar disappeared. Now the bar always comes back on OK, and the D-pad reliably moves between its buttons (rewind/FF, play, stop, captions, sleep timer, etc).
